project_info.name: Mita Physio Cure
project_info.location: Birampur, Bagnan, Howrah, West Bengal 711303, India
project_info.description: Premium healthcare UI/UX for a local physiotherapy clinic prioritizing frictionless booking, calming aesthetics, and transparent trust signals.

fonts.import_instructions: Import these fonts via Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter for headings.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900

layout.spacing: Use generous padding: py-20 or py-24 for main sections to create a calming, uncrowded feel.
layout.grid: Services: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Use Bento-style asymmetry for About/Features sections.
layout.borders_and_shadows: Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for soft, approachable medical feel. Apply ambient diffuse shadows (shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/5) to cards.

components.navigation: Sticky top navigation using Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50). Must feature Logo, Nav links, and a 'Call Now' CTA button.
components.hero: Split layout or clean centered block. Overlapping Trust Badges ('4.5/5 Rating', 'Home Visit Available'). Use the primary CTA 'Book Appointment' prominently.
components.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right button (z-50), glowing emerald green effect. Icon: WhatsApp. Action: opens wa.me link.
components.services_grid: 16 clean cards detailing services (Stroke Rehab, Back Pain, etc.). Use lucide-react icons for each. White background, subtle border, hover lift (-translate-y-1).
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Textarea, Select. Keep fields minimal. OnSubmit -> construct WhatsApp URL and window.open(url, '_blank').
components.faq: Shadcn Accordion component for common questions.
components.testimonials: Shadcn Carousel for patient reviews to build trust.
components.map: Embedded Google Map iframe for the clinic location (Birampur, Bagnan, Howrah).
components.legal: Simple, clean text pages for Privacy Policy and T&C.

images.description: Patient stretching leg in a modern clinic - Ideal for hero section
Modern medical clinic interior with examination bed - Ideal for About section
Physiotherapy treatment session - Ideal for CTA or secondary sections

testing.data_testid: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-appointment-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a responsive Next.js/React app using Tailwind CSS, adhering to the 'Premium Healthcare' aesthetic.
Implement lucide-react icons for all 16 services (e.g., Activity for exercise, HeartPulse for stroke, Accessibility for elderly).
Ensure 'Home Visit Available' is prominently displayed as a badge in the hero and header/footer.
The Appointment form MUST construct a WhatsApp wa.me URL (https://wa.me/917477707139?text=...) with the user's form details and redirect them in a new tab.
Use framer-motion for page load reveals and staggered grid entry animations.
Ensure 'Click-to-Call' functionality is active on phone numbers (href='tel:+917477707139').
Include local SEO meta tags and structural hierarchy suitable for 'Bagnan, Howrah' targeting.
